page.content: In Table 1, the HI titers (GMT) show that for the H3 subtype, the MHa row has values of 253, while the MNHa row has 202, and the pCAGGS row has <10; for the H1 subtype, MHa has 320, MNHa has 253, and pCAGGS again has <10; for r164, MHa has 13, MNHa has 10, and pCAGGS has <10; and for rPan09, MHa has 16, MNHa has 13, and pCAGGS has <10. In Table 2, the Radial Strain (%) shows values of −0.5 ± 4.0 for Mouse Simple, −5.5 ± 13.1 for Mouse Interobserver, −1.6 ± 4.2 for Human Simple, and 3.3 ± 12.9 for Human Interobserver; Circumferential strain (%) presents −0.2 ± 0.6 for Mouse Simple, 1.0 ± 3.6 for Mouse Interobserver, −0.2 ± 0.7 for Human Simple, and −0.5 ± 1.8 for Human Interobserver; Longitudinal strain (%) indicates −0.5 ± 1.6 for Mouse Simple, −0.2 ± 6.4 for Mouse Interobserver, 0.3 ± 2.9 for Human Simple, and 0.4 ± 3.0 for Human Interobserver; and Torsion (deg/cm) displays 0.0 ± 0.8 for Mouse Simple, 0.3 ± 2.2 for Mouse Interobserver, 0.0 ± 0.3 for Human Simple, and −0.0 ± 0.4 for Human Interobserver.

lines.text: In Table 1, the HI titers (GMT) show that for the H3 subtype, the MHa row has values of 253, while the MNHa row has 202,
and the pCAGGS row has <10; for the H1 subtype, MHa has 320, MNHa has 253, and pCAGGS again has <10; for r164, MHa
has 13, MNHa has 10, and pCAGGS has <10; and for rPan09, MHa has 16, MNHa has 13, and pCAGGS has <10. In Table 2,
the Radial Strain (%) shows values of −0.5 ± 4.0 for Mouse Simple, −5.5 ± 13.1 for Mouse Interobserver, −1.6 ± 4.2 for Human
Simple, and 3.3 ± 12.9 for Human Interobserver; Circumferential strain (%) presents −0.2 ± 0.6 for Mouse Simple, 1.0 ± 3.6 for
Mouse Interobserver, −0.2 ± 0.7 for Human Simple, and −0.5 ± 1.8 for Human Interobserver; Longitudinal strain (%) indicates
−0.5 ± 1.6 for Mouse Simple, −0.2 ± 6.4 for Mouse Interobserver, 0.3 ± 2.9 for Human Simple, and 0.4 ± 3.0 for Human
Interobserver; and Torsion (deg/cm) displays 0.0 ± 0.8 for Mouse Simple, 0.3 ± 2.2 for Mouse Interobserver, 0.0 ± 0.3 for
Human Simple, and −0.0 ± 0.4 for Human Interobserver.
